tracks.rawText: 3:06Bajo En La MesaCustomReggaeton track at 90 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a classic dembow rhythm with a heavy, rounded kick drum and crisp, layered snares, A syncopated, plucked synth bassline provides the harmonic foundation, Melodic elements include a staccato, high-pitched synth lead playing a repetitive minor-key hook and occasional atmospheric pad swells, Male vocals are processed with pitch correction and light saturation, alternating between melodic singing and rhythmic rapping, The production uses frequent rhythmic mutes, riser effects, and vocal chops for transitions, Percussion includes woodblock-style hits and shakers that accent the off-beatsPublishRemix
tracks.title: Bajo En La Mesa

tracks.rawText: 3:04Bajo La lunaCustomReggaeton track at 90 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a classic dembow rhythm with a heavy, rounded kick drum and crisp, layered snares, A syncopated, plucked synth bassline provides the harmonic foundation, Melodic elements include a staccato, high-pitched synth lead playing a repetitive minor-key hook and occasional atmospheric pad swells, Male vocals are processed with pitch correction and light saturation, alternating between melodic singing and rhythmic rapping, The production uses frequent rhythmic mutes, riser effects, and vocal chops for transitions, Percussion includes woodblock-style hits and shakers that accent the off-beats2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Bajo La luna

tracks.rawText: 3:07Split Pine Riverv5.5clasico reggae 80s con influencia dancehall one drop relajado pero energico kick profundo caja seca y hi hats sincopados bajo calido y redondo guitarra Reggae, Ska, Rock, Pop Rock staccato organo jamaicano en chops sintetizadores vintage discretos voces caribenas expresivas al frente mezcla analogica con reverb espacial y textura cruda festiva y positivaStefany3PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:03Split Pine Riverv5.5Reggae clásico de los años 80 con influencias dancehall, ritmo relajado pero enérgico, bajo profundo y cálido, batería con patrón one-drop, guitarra rítmica con staccato, arreglos con teclados tipo órgano jamaicano y toques de sintetizador vintage, voces melódicas y expresivas con estilo caribeño, atmósfera festiva y positiva, mezcla con sensación analógica y reverb espacialStefany1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Split Pine River
